headline: Digital Realty Declares Quarterly Cash Dividends for Common and Preferred Stock
summary: AUSTIN, Texas, May 12, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Digital Realty (NYSE: DLR), the world’s largest cloud- and carrier-neutral data center platform, announced today its board of directors has authorized quarterly cash dividends for common and preferred stock for the second quarter of 2026. Common StockDigital Realty’s board of directors authorized a cash dividend of $1.22 per share to common stockholders of record as of the close of business on June 15, 2026.
